title: crotalaria fysonii
intro: Crotalaria fysonii, also known as Fyson's rattle pod or Indian rattle bush, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria fysonii include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine preparations to treat various ailments.
